examples: But, I think the cooperation even more unimportance.
To realise the unimportance of time is the gate of wisdom.
Yet, whoever he was, Daphne was quite mistaken about his unimportance or his irrelevance to her life.
Northern English word meaning to worry and complain, as if one were an old maid, about something of near complete unimportance.
This comes back to the perceived unimportance of followers.
